parsed.message: Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
Thanks — you're eligible. May I transfer you to a licensed agent?
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
Thanks — you're not yet eligible. Is there something else I can help you with?

expect_errors: message missing any of ['disability', 'disabled', 'SSDI', 'Social Security']: "Thanks — you're not yet eligible. Is there something else I can help you with?"
state_machine_errors: close_ineligible when age<65 requires has_disability true/false first

parsed.message: Thank you. May I transfer you to a licensed agent?
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
Thank you. What is your age?
Understood. Are you currently disabled?
I see. You're not eligible for Medicare at this time.
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
I understand. How about another time then? If you change your mind, give us a call.
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
I see. You don't have either Part A or Part B. Is there anything else I can assist you with?
Hi, this is Sarah from the Medicare department. Do you have a few minutes?
Great! Do you have Medicare Part A and Part B?
I'm sorry — I'll end the call now. Goodbye.
